query: Detect all small vehicles and compute the ratio of their total area (using all bounding boxes, in square meter) to the area of the main parking lot (bbox: 1021, 26, 1764, 1501, gsd=0.12117843786m/pixel).
final_answer: The total area covered by all small vehicle bounding boxes is approximately 33.23 square meters. The ratio of small vehicle area to the parking lot area is 0.00102.

evaluation.question: Are the total area of all small vehicle bounding boxes reported within the acceptable range of 29.907 to 36.553 square meters?
Is the ratio of small vehicle area to the parking lot area within the range 0.0009 to 0.002?
Does the response include both the computed total vehicle area and the ratio to the parking lot area?
